2606.10802.title: Boosting ECG Classification Performance by Pre-training with Synthesized Data
2606.10802.paper_summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) typically require extensive datasets for effective training. In the medical domain, acquiring large-scale data is often challenging due to privacy concerns and the rarity of certain diseases. To address this data scarcity, we investigate the efficacy of training DNN models using synthetic data, generated based on domain-specific medical knowledge. Specifically, we develop a knowledge-driven Gaussian-composition synthesis algorithm for single-lead II ECGs, in which each heartbeat is represented by Gaussian-shaped P, Q, R, S, and T wave components. Using this simulator, we generate synthetic data for four abnormal electrocardiogram (ECG) classes: atrial fibrillation (AF), atrial flutter (AFLT), premature ventricular complex (PVC), and Wolff-Parkinson-White Syndrome (WPW). We evaluate the utility of this synthetic data by conducting abnormal ECG classification using ten different DNN architectures. Our results demonstrate that synthetic-to-real training improves classification performance for three of the four target abnormalities, with the largest architecture-averaged gain of $33.2\%$ observed for AFLT. Further analysis reveals that the performance enhancement from synthetic data is more pronounced with smaller real-world datasets. These findings suggest that domain-knowledge-based synthetic ECGs can serve as a useful pre-training resource, particularly in scenarios where real-world data are limited or difficult to obtain.
2606.10802.paper_summary_zh: 深度神經網絡（DNNs）通常需要大量數據集以進行有效的訓練。<lb/>在醫療領域，由於隱私問題和某些疾病的稀有性，獲取大規模數據往往具有挑戰性。<lb/>為了解決這一數據稀缺問題，我們研究了使用基於特定領域醫療知識生成的合成數據來訓練DNN模型的有效性。<lb/>具體而言，我們為單導聯II型心電圖（ECG）開發了一種基於知識驅動的高斯組合合成算法，其中每一次心跳由高斯形狀的P、Q、R、S和T波組件表示。<lb/>利用這個模擬器，我們為四種異常心電圖（ECG）類別生成合成數據：心房顫動（AF）、心房撲動（AFLT）、早期心室複雜（PVC）和沃爾夫-帕金森-懷特綜合症（WPW）。<lb/>我們通過使用十種不同的DNN架構進行異常ECG分類來評估這些合成數據的實用性。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，合成到真實的訓練提高了四種目標異常中三種的分類性能，其中AFLT的架構平均增益最大，達到$33.2\%$。<lb/>進一步分析顯示，合成數據帶來的性能提升在較小的真實世界數據集上更為明顯。<lb/>這些發現表明，基於領域知識的合成ECG可以作為有用的預訓練資源，特別是在真實數據有限或難以獲得的情況下。
2606.10802.author: Naoki Nonaka et.al.
